records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't realize you were copying us behind our backs all this time...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't realize you were copying us behind our backs all this time...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The stage is full of too much commotion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything after the Game's ending had already been planned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything after the Game's ending had already been planned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything after the Game's ending had already been planned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, give up. You cannot escape my script already.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So, give up. You cannot escape my script already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Graah!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Graah!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Graah!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this, you are fatally wounded. If you don't stop the bleeding from your abdomen, you will die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this, you are fatally wounded. If you don't stop the bleeding from your abdomen, you will die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this, you are fatally wounded. If you don't stop the bleeding from your abdomen, you will die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-keke...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: K-keke...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, it felt somehow familiar...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, it felt somehow familiar...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, it felt somehow familiar...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's so amusing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's so amusing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's so amusing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This unpleasant feeling I've had since I first saw you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This unpleasant feeling I've had since I first saw you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This unpleasant feeling I've had since I first saw you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I get it now... Why you wouldn't show your face in the front lines...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I get it now... Why you wouldn't show your face in the front lines...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I get it now... Why you wouldn't show your face in the front lines...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You made a contract with that damned <color=#ffd34c>Ignorant Monarch</color>, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You made a contract with that damned <color=#ffd34c>Ignorant Monarch</color>, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You made a contract with that damned <color=#ffd34c>Ignorant Monarch</color>, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's surprising. I've been hiding that power from everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's surprising. I've been hiding that power from everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's surprising. I've been hiding that power from everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll admit. You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll admit. You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll admit. You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, your goal is to open the Coffin...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, your goal is to open the Coffin...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, your goal is to open the Coffin...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But you'd have to be insane to
8g

8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, what changes with your knowing that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, what changes with your knowing that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, what changes with your knowing that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but that information will never reach Commander's ears on time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but that information will never reach Commander's ears on time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but that information will never reach Commander's ears on time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because you will be off this stage for a while now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because you will be off this stage for a while now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because you will be off this stage for a while now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! You think I'm going down that easily?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! You think I'm going down that easily?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! You think I'm going down that easily?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure to cause a ruckus until the very end...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure to cause a ruckus until the very end...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure to cause a ruckus until the very end...

records.m_Talk_ENG: so I dare you to end me if you can!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: so I dare you to end me if you can!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: so I dare you to end me if you can!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: While pretending to attempt a final blow, she aimed at the ground, creating a chance to escape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While pretending to attempt a final blow, she aimed at the ground, creating a chance to escape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While pretending to attempt a final blow, she aimed at the ground, creating a chance to escape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It might seem violent at first glance, but one could say it was meticulous and a Firstwing-like behavior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It might seem violent at first glance, but one could say it was meticulous and a Firstwing-like behavior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It might seem violent at first glance, but one could say it was meticulous and a Firstwing-like behavior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But everything is according to the script. I anticipated this much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But everything is according to the script. I anticipated this much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But everything is according to the script. I anticipated this much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's only a matter of time before you leave the stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's only a matter of time before you leave the stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's only a matter of time before you leave the stage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Speak, Richard Werner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Speak, Richard Werner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Speak, Richard Werner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan, how did it turn out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan, how did it turn out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan, how did it turn out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There has been a report about observing an unidentified flash of light in the operational area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There has been a report about observing an unidentified flash of light in the operational area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There has been a report about observing an unidentified flash of light in the operational area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Firstwing is severely injured. I lost her, but she couldn't have gone far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Firstwing is severely injured. I lost her, but she couldn't have gone far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Firstwing is severely injured. I lost her, but she couldn't have gone far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I'll deploy all the search members we have on standby outside the operational area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I'll deploy all the search members we have on standby outside the operational area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I'll deploy all the search members we have on standby outside the operational area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an opportunity of a lifetime. We must have her in our custody, no matter how long it takes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an opportunity of a lifetime. We must have her in our custody, no matter how long it takes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an opportunity of a lifetime. We must have her in our custody, no matter how long it takes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll see myself out at this point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll see myself out at this point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll see myself out at this point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would prove troublesome if my backstage identity gets exposed to others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would prove troublesome if my backstage identity gets exposed to others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would prove troublesome if my backstage identity gets exposed to others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. It's a shame you're leaving, but that was our original terms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. It's a shame you're leaving, but that was our original terms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. It's a shame you're leaving, but that was our original terms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Six Wings find out about my betrayal, they will come after me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Six Wings find out about my betrayal, they will come after me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Six Wings find out about my betrayal, they will come after me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I will go back to being an actress for the time being.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I will go back to being an actress for the time being.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I will go back to being an actress for the time being.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Due to the nature of Six Wings, they won't openly harm any well-known celebrities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Due to the nature of Six Wings, they won't openly harm any well-known celebrities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Due to the nature of Six Wings, they won't openly harm any well-known celebrities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As usual, I ask that the Administration conceal any information about what happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As usual, I ask that the Administration conceal any information about what happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As usual, I ask that the Administration conceal any information about what happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I must ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I must ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I must ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is ungentlemanly behavior trying to delve into a lady's secrets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is ungentlemanly behavior trying to delve into a lady's secrets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is ungentlemanly behavior trying to delve into a lady's secrets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, as you may already know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, as you may already know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, as you may already know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if she is wounded, Firstwing is no easy opponent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if she is wounded, Firstwing is no easy opponent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if she is wounded, Firstwing is no easy opponent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Show any signs of hesitation, and she'll use her brainwashing abilities to escape your grasp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Show any signs of hesitation, and she'll use her brainwashing abilities to escape your grasp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Show any signs of hesitation, and she'll use her brainwashing abilities to escape your grasp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I suggest you provide your men with a mind jammer, or deploy a Counter who is resistant to mental attacks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I suggest you provide your men with a mind jammer, or deploy a Counter who is resistant to mental attacks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I suggest you provide your men with a mind jammer, or deploy a Counter who is resistant to mental attacks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Ozymandias should be a perfect match.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Ozymandias should be a perfect match.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Ozymandias should be a perfect match.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, she's busy with another mission and can't join this one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, she's busy with another mission and can't join this one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, she's busy with another mission and can't join this one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll find someone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll find someone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll find someone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll send you the coordinates of this Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll send you the coordinates of this Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll send you the coordinates of this Corrupted Area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, Swan. I think you're mistaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, Swan. I think you're mistaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, Swan. I think you're mistaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What
8ks wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What
8ks wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What
8ks wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The coordinates you gave aren't in the Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The coordinates you gave aren't in the Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The coordinates you gave aren't in the Corrupted Area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That place was one of the last strongholds defended by the Multinational Coalition Force during the Grand Purification War twenty years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That place was one of the last strongholds defended by the Multinational Coalition Force during the Grand Purification War twenty years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That place was one of the last strongholds defended by the Multinational Coalition Force during the Grand Purification War twenty years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still remember it vividly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still remember it vividly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still remember it vividly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My unit was also quite indebted to the villagers nearby during the war.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My unit was also quite indebted to the villagers nearby during the war.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My unit was also quite indebted to the villagers nearby during the war.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to them, we were able to secure the base until the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to them, we were able to secure the base until the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to them, we were able to secure the base until the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was a village nearby...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was a village nearby...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was a village nearby...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Stop right there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Stop right there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Stop right there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft, you idiot! You think I'll stop just because you said so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft, you idiot! You think I'll stop just because you said so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft, you idiot! You think I'll stop just because you said so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Don't run! What if you trip and fall?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Don't run! What if you trip and fall?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Don't run! What if you trip and fall?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I was doing my research... this place with no doubt was a Corrupted Area...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I was doing my research... this place with no doubt was a Corrupted Area...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I was doing my research... this place with no doubt was a Corrupted Area...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's just like Richard said. It's a small village where people live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's just like Richard said. It's a small village where people live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's just like Richard said. It's a small village where people live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That woman, why is she looking around our village?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That woman, why is she looking around our village?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That woman, why is she looking around our village?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's not from here. What if she's someone from the Administration who came to inspect this place to develop it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's not from here. What if she's someone from the Administration who came to inspect this place to develop it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's not from here. What if she's someone from the Administration who came to inspect this place to develop it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then, shouldn't we be greeting her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then, shouldn't we be greeting her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then, shouldn't we be greeting her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The village facilities might be outdated, but the people's spirit here isn't that bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The village facilities might be outdated, but the people's spirit here isn't that bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The village facilities might be outdated, but the people's spirit here isn't that bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It feels like an old and quiet village in the country. If I were in the slums of Charade, they would've pointed a gun at me first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It feels like an old and quiet village in the country. If I were in the slums of Charade, they would've pointed a gun at me first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It feels like an old and quiet village in the country. If I were in the slums of Charade, they would've pointed a gun at me first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Richard said that this village has been here for twenty years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Richard said that this village has been here for twenty years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Richard said that this village has been here for twenty years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, Sephira caused a village that had vanished twenty years ago to reappear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, Sephira caused a village that had vanished twenty years ago to reappear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, Sephira caused a village that had vanished twenty years ago to reappear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A change in reality accompanied by a strong distortion in information...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A change in reality accompanied by a strong distortion in information...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A change in reality accompanied by a strong distortion in information...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I expected. The law of creating a world is perhaps...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I expected. The law of creating a world is perhaps...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I expected. The law of creating a world is perhaps...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What meaning does restoring a small village have?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What meaning does restoring a small village have?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What meaning does restoring a small village have?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... Hello, miss...
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... Hello, miss...
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... Hello, miss...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it? Is there something you want to say to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it? Is there something you want to say to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it? Is there something you want to say to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Uncle Hans said that I should be polite to the guest who came to our village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Uncle Hans said that I should be polite to the guest who came to our village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Uncle Hans said that I should be polite to the guest who came to our village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an apple pie made with homegrown apples. Would you like a taste?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an apple pie made with homegrown apples. Would you like a taste?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an apple pie made with homegrown apples. Would you like a taste?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, thank you. It looks delicious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, thank you. It looks delicious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, thank you. It looks delicious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... did you come from the city?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... did you come from the city?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... did you come from the city?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I stopped by while traveling around here. I didn't even know a village existed here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I stopped by while traveling around here. I didn't even know a village existed here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I stopped by while traveling around here. I didn't even know a village existed here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then, which city did you come from? Chamber? Charade? Or Ground One...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then, which city did you come from? Chamber? Charade? Or Ground One...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then, which city did you come from? Chamber? Charade? Or Ground One...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: What's it like in the city? I... actually want to go there once.

records.m_Talk_DEU: O-of course, I can't right now because I'm poor and my parents are against it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course, I can't right now because I'm poor and my parents are against it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think this village is nice and quiet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think this village is nice and quiet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think this village is nice and quiet.

records.m_Talk_DEU: May I ask why you wish to live in a city?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I ask why you wish to live in a city?

root.m_Talk_ENG: so I dare you to end me if you can!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: While pretending to attempt a final blow, she aimed at the ground, creating a chance to escape.

root.m_Talk_FRA: While pretending to attempt a final blow, she aimed at the ground, creating a chance to escape.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It might seem violent at first glance, but one could say it was meticulous and a Firstwing-like behavior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It might seem violent at first glance, but one could say it was meticulous and a Firstwing-like behavior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It might seem violent at first glance, but one could say it was meticulous and a Firstwing-like behavior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But everything is according to the script. I anticipated this much.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But everything is according to the script. I anticipated this much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's only a matter of time before you leave the stage.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's only a matter of time before you leave the stage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Speak, Richard Werner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Speak, Richard Werner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Speak, Richard Werner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan, how did it turn out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan, how did it turn out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan, how did it turn out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There has been a report about observing an unidentified flash of light in the operational area.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There has been a report about observing an unidentified flash of light in the operational area.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There has been a report about observing an unidentified flash of light in the operational area.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Firstwing is severely injured. I lost her, but she couldn't have gone far.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Firstwing is severely injured. I lost her, but she couldn't have gone far.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Firstwing is severely injured. I lost her, but she couldn't have gone far.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I'll deploy all the search members we have on standby outside the operational area.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I'll deploy all the search members we have on standby outside the operational area.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I'll deploy all the search members we have on standby outside the operational area.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an opportunity of a lifetime. We must have her in our custody, no matter how long it takes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an opportunity of a lifetime. We must have her in our custody, no matter how long it takes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an opportunity of a lifetime. We must have her in our custody, no matter how long it takes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll see myself out at this point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll see myself out at this point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll see myself out at this point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would prove troublesome if my backstage identity gets exposed to others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It would prove troublesome if my backstage identity gets exposed to others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It would prove troublesome if my backstage identity gets exposed to others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. It's a shame you're leaving, but that was our original terms.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. It's a shame you're leaving, but that was our original terms.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. It's a shame you're leaving, but that was our original terms.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Six Wings find out about my betrayal, they will come after me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Six Wings find out about my betrayal, they will come after me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Six Wings find out about my betrayal, they will come after me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I will go back to being an actress for the time being.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I will go back to being an actress for the time being.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I will go back to being an actress for the time being.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Due to the nature of Six Wings, they won't openly harm any well-known celebrities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Due to the nature of Six Wings, they won't openly harm any well-known celebrities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Due to the nature of Six Wings, they won't openly harm any well-known celebrities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As usual, I ask that the Administration conceal any information about what happened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As usual, I ask that the Administration conceal any information about what happened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As usual, I ask that the Administration conceal any information about what happened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I promise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I promise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I promise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I must ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I must ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I must ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is ungentlemanly behavior trying to delve into a lady's secrets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is ungentlemanly behavior trying to delve into a lady's secrets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is ungentlemanly behavior trying to delve into a lady's secrets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, as you may already know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, as you may already know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, as you may already know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if she is wounded, Firstwing is no easy opponent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if she is wounded, Firstwing is no easy opponent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if she is wounded, Firstwing is no easy opponent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Show any signs of hesitation, and she'll use her brainwashing abilities to escape your grasp.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Show any signs of hesitation, and she'll use her brainwashing abilities to escape your grasp.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I suggest you provide your men with a mind jammer, or deploy a Counter who is resistant to mental attacks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, she's busy with another mission and can't join this one.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, she's busy with another mission and can't join this one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll find someone else.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll find someone else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

What

root.m_Talk_FRA: The coordinates you gave aren't in the Corrupted Area.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That place was one of the last strongholds defended by the Multinational Coalition Force during the Grand Purification War twenty years ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I still remember it vividly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I still remember it vividly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I still remember it vividly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My unit was also quite indebted to the villagers nearby during the war.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My unit was also quite indebted to the villagers nearby during the war.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My unit was also quite indebted to the villagers nearby during the war.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to them, we were able to secure the base until the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There was a village nearby...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There was a village nearby...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There was a village nearby...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Stop right there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Stop right there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Stop right there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft, you idiot! You think I'll stop just because you said so?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Don't run! What if you trip and fall?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Don't run! What if you trip and fall?!

root.m_Talk_FRA: When I was doing my research... this place with no doubt was a Corrupted Area...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's just like Richard said. It's a small village where people live.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's just like Richard said. It's a small village where people live.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's just like Richard said. It's a small village where people live.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That woman, why is she looking around our village?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That woman, why is she looking around our village?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That woman, why is she looking around our village?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's not from here. What if she's someone from the Administration who came to inspect this place to develop it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's not from here. What if she's someone from the Administration who came to inspect this place to develop it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's not from here. What if she's someone from the Administration who came to inspect this place to develop it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then, shouldn't we be greeting her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then, shouldn't we be greeting her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then, shouldn't we be greeting her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The village facilities might be outdated, but the people's spirit here isn't that bad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The village facilities might be outdated, but the people's spirit here isn't that bad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The village facilities might be outdated, but the people's spirit here isn't that bad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It feels like an old and quiet village in the country. If I were in the slums of Charade, they would've pointed a gun at me first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It feels like an old and quiet village in the country. If I were in the slums of Charade, they would've pointed a gun at me first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It feels like an old and quiet village in the country. If I were in the slums of Charade, they would've pointed a gun at me first.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Richard said that this village has been here for twenty years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Richard said that this village has been here for twenty years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, Sephira caused a village that had vanished twenty years ago to reappear?
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, Sephira caused a village that had vanished twenty years ago to reappear?
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, Sephira caused a village that had vanished twenty years ago to reappear?

root.m_Talk_DEU: A change in reality accompanied by a strong distortion in information...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A change in reality accompanied by a strong distortion in information...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I expected. The law of creating a world is perhaps...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I expected. The law of creating a world is perhaps...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I expected. The law of creating a world is perhaps...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But why?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But why?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But why?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What meaning does restoring a small village have?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What meaning does restoring a small village have?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What meaning does restoring a small village have?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... Hello, miss...
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... Hello, miss...
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... Hello, miss...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it? Is there something you want to say to me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it? Is there something you want to say to me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it? Is there something you want to say to me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Uncle Hans said that I should be polite to the guest who came to our village.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Uncle Hans said that I should be polite to the guest who came to our village.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Uncle Hans said that I should be polite to the guest who came to our village.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an apple pie made with homegrown apples. Would you like a taste?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an apple pie made with homegrown apples. Would you like a taste?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an apple pie made with homegrown apples. Would you like a taste?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, thank you. It looks delicious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, thank you. It looks delicious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, thank you. It looks delicious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... did you come from the city?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... did you come from the city?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... did you come from the city?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I stopped by while traveling around here. I didn't even know a village existed here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I stopped by while traveling around here. I didn't even know a village existed here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I stopped by while traveling around here. I didn't even know a village existed here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then, which city did you come from? Chamber? Charade? Or Ground One...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then, which city did you come from? Chamber? Charade? Or Ground One...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then, which city did you come from? Chamber? Charade? Or Ground One...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: What's it like in the city? I... actually want to go there once.

root.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course, I can't right now because I'm poor and my parents are against it...

root.m_Talk_FRA: I think this village is nice and quiet.
